goals: Initialize the three-tier memory system for storing pumpkin carving designs, client preferences, and creative ideas
Add current pumpkin carving project details to short-term memory (client name, design theme, deadline)
Search long-term memory for past pumpkin design ideas and techniques used in previous years
Check the status of all three memory tiers to see what information is currently stored
View the current short-term memory window to review recent project details

user_agent_config.personality: Creative and detail-oriented, enjoys organizing their work process, prefers practical solutions that help manage multiple client projects during fall season.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Does not know technical details about memory management systems; understands concepts like short-term vs long-term memory in human terms; asks in natural language about storing and retrieving design ideas.

end_condition: User has set up their memory system, stored current project information, and successfully retrieved past design ideas. They express satisfaction with the system or ask no further questions about basic setup.
